title: January 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 4''' is the 4th day of the year. 361 days (362 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1923|1923]] – [[Chic Stone]] is born.
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Pauline Rennie]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Greg Cipes]] is born.
*[[1982]] – ''[[Traitor's Gambit]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 29|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 29]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 133|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 133]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Republic 81|''Republic'' 81]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Angela Morley]] dies.
*[[2022]] – [[The Story of the Faithful Wookiee (Little Golden Book)|''The Story of the Faithful Wookiee'' Little Golden Book adaptation]] published.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: The Fallen Star]]'' published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: The Fallen Star (audiobook)|''The High Republic: The Fallen Star'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: The Rising Storm]]'' published in paperback.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: Mission to Disaster]]'' eBook published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Mission to Disaster (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Mission to Disaster'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 Junior Novel|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' Junior Novel]] published.
*2022 – [[Galaxy of Creatures (book)|''Galaxy of Creatures'' World of Reading book]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 30|''Star Wars'' (2020) 30]] published.
*2023 – [[The Bad Batch Season 2|''The Bad Batch'' Season 2]] premieres on [[Disney+]] with "[[Spoils of War]]" and "[[Ruins of War]]."
*[[2028]] – [[Untitled picture book]] to be published.
